title: AWeber vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare AWeber and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
h1: AWeber vs Constant Contact: Email Marketing Showdown
intro: AWeber and Constant Contact are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. AWeber emphasizes simplicity and affordability with a free tier, while Constant Contact focuses on comprehensive marketing tools for small businesses and nonprofits. This comparison helps you decide which platform aligns best with your email marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You want a free email marketing option with no subscriber limits during trial
You're a blogger or solopreneur prioritizing affordability and simplicity
You need strong automation features like autoresponders and RSS-to-email campaigns
choose_b_if: You need SMS marketing and social media ad integration
You run an e-commerce business requiring built-in e-commerce tools
You're a nonprofit or local business needing event management features

faq.q: Is AWeber better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Neither is objectively 'better'—it depends on your needs. AWeber wins for simplicity and free-tier access, making it ideal for solopreneurs. Constant Contact excels in feature breadth with SMS, social ads, and e-commerce tools, making it better for growing businesses. Compare based on your specific requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Constant Contact?
faq.a: AWeber offers a free plan for up to 500 subscribers, making it cheaper for startups. Constant Contact starts at $12/month with no free tier. For paid plans, Constant Contact at $12/month slightly undercuts AWeber's $15/month entry price, but AWeber's free option gives it the edge for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and exports. You can export your contacts from Constant Contact as a CSV file and import them into AWeber. However, campaign history and detailed analytics won't transfer, so plan your migration accordingly to avoid losing important data.
